## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] UI
- [ ] State/Stores
- [ ] Hooks
- [ ] Backend/Integrations
- [ ] Security/AppSec
- [ ] DB/Migrations
- [ ] Other

## Testing (required)

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Manual smoke checklist

- [ ] App loads without runtime errors
- [ ] Route(s) affected by this change work as expected (login/logout if applicable)
- [ ] Key user flow(s) for this feature pass (happy path)
- [ ] Error/empty states render sensibly (if applicable)

## Migration timing (required)

- [ ] If this PR touches DB/migrations: migrations are applied only after merge to `electron` by the Release Manager (never from PR branches)
